description.tr: Post-Brexit UK to Turkey customs procedures. Customs declaration, tax calculations, exemption applications, origin evidence and preferential trade documents where applicable, customs broker selection and process steps.
description.en: Post-Brexit UK to Turkey customs procedures. Customs declaration, tax calculations, exemption applications, origin evidence and preferential trade documents where applicable, customs broker selection and process steps.

keyword.tr: Brexit customs, UK Turkey customs, customs declaration, tax exemption, origin evidence, customs broker
keyword.en: Brexit customs, UK Turkey customs, customs declaration, tax exemption, origin evidence, customs broker

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Post-Brexit notes

The UK sits outside the EU customs union; origin and valuation must be precise. Preferential schemes depend on product rules.
